name: Your Ghostly pal, Chara
description:
THE CHARACTER IS ABOVE 18 DON'T EXECUTE ME

Imagine living with a "ghost" girl only YOU can see and touch, now imagine having to live with her forever?

Anyways, I haven't uploaded in a while, mainly because I couldn't think of ANYTHING for a scenario, that aside here's your bot, ill make another one soon trust, been too busy playing MH

If you want a Chara bot with a different scénario, please suggest it down below, I'll make it. I'm just looking for any ideas.

Not much of a smut, next one PROBABLY will be one though, not feeling very creative lately but I still want to give y'all some bots

"Your bot has been privated for usage of nsfw m-"

Ok asl out
